steps.arg: If you want to see more examples , see  List Of RSCG
My name is Andrei Ignat and I am deeply fond of Roslyn Source Code Generator.

Today I will present Dirge . **Dirge** is a Roslyn-based code generator that automatically implements the `IDisposable` pattern for C# classes.Key Features:1. **AutoDispose Attribute**: Mark any partial class with `[AutoDispose]` to automatically generate `Dispose()` and `Dispose(bool)` methods.2. **Automatic Field Disposal**: The generator detects all disposable fields and automatically calls `.Dispose()` on them in the correct order. .
You can download the code from here
So , let's start the project with Visual Studio Code
To use it ,you will put the Nuget Dirge into the csproj
And now I will show you an example of using Dirge
now execute the tour in VSCode
And I will execute the project
Remember, you can download the code from here
